author: @Z-Ack
text: Bruv.  Get a lapel mic..   i cunt ear a word yer wispering..

author: @bossoholic
text: The hotdog has a lot of resistance. 450v can only push so many amps at a time through the dog. If it was 4,000v at that power, I think it would have exploded.

author: @MrPoffersher
text: Loved the video. Have to ask though, what's with all the camo?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: +Samuel Poff we work with graphene - it gets everywhere and makes everything dirty camo is cheap and easy to clean and lasts for ages

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: +Eddy Burt (eddyb) i think we'll be ok mate

author: @kieronwheeler
text: That was excellent! God forbid anyone close to you has a heart attack - at least now you'll be able to bring them back. Any chance you'll build a tank circuit to replace the Arduino? With the previous Slayer vid in mind, you can see where I'm headed...

author: @whig01
text: Blowing up those capacitors could have been a serious injury. Hope you at least wore protective eyewear.

author: @thagrit
text: I see a coil gun or a z pinch can crusher.

author: @bartoszbarejko1585
text: There is something wrong with your device unless it is only for fun. Your Inductor is too small  and your capacitors are too big.and there is too little controllers.

replies.author: @AshleyMillsTube
replies.text: hey you know what they say about small inductors! it's how you use it mate!

author: @cooltroops8182
text: Even when you know it will bang ! It still makes you jump love leccy, bigger bangs like photo induction channel are fun cheers lads

replies.author: @AshleyMillsTube
replies.text: cool troops cheers man, love photons channel too, great stuff!

replies.author: @AshleyMillsTube
replies.text: papalevies yeah, sorry about that dude, edited in kdenlive with headphones on and didn't notice the audio mix until after upload. Too late now, just gonna have to turn up your speakers ;D

author: @johnnydoe6325
text: (joking tone) Now hookup the MegaFarad Capacitor,and discharge it.

replies.author: @jfausset
replies.text: I think the MegaFarad supercapacitor is why I compulsively check this channel

author: @TheGEODEAHOLIC
text:
when it popped that 64v cap itstill had about 1/2 its' power left by the gauge.
i wonder what the voltage & amperage are in a good bolt of lightning? that'll zap damp sand into a tube of glass... looks all dendritic & rooty when it cools.

replies.author: @AshleyMillsTube
replies.text: TheGEODEAHOLIC artificial lightning, hmm :D I've always wanted to make those dendritic lichtenstein figures, they are so cool. Definitely need more power for that

replies.author: @TheGEODEAHOLIC
replies.text: actually, t-storm lightning into damp sand will create a 3-d tube of hollow semi transparent glass called a fulgurite, they tend to be all contorted & somewhat dendritic
